name: Fresh Fruit Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar, cornstarch, and salt in a 3-quart saucepan.
2. Stir in water and rose wine. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly.
3. Boil and stir for one minute. Remove from heat.
4. Stir in cranberry juice. Cover loosely and refrigerate until chilled.
5. Stir in the fresh fruit. Serve with sour cream or whipped cream if desired.
